📋 Your Event Details

Friday, July 25th, 2026
🕘
Time
9:00 AM – 1:00 PM
Doors open at 8:30 AM — arrive early for the best seats!

📍
124 NW 12th Street
Oklahoma City, OK
📍 Open in Google Maps

What to Expect

  • A welcoming, no-pressure environment
  • Expert presentation on Rent-to-Own, Lease Options & Contract for Deed
  • Real examples of Oklahoma City families who became homeowners
  • Live Q&A with a licensed Oklahoma real estate agent
  • Light refreshments provided
  • Bring a notebook — you'll want to take notes!
  • Spouses, partners, and family members are welcome

Know Someone Who Needs This?

Share this free event with a friend or family member who wants to own a home.

Stay Connected Before, During & After the Event

Join our private group to stay in the loop on event updates, connect with other attendees, and get early access to homes before they hit the market.

Event updates, reminders & last-minute details
Connect with other OKC families attending the seminar

Free to join. No spam. Just a real community of OKC families.

This is not legal or financial advice. Tez is a licensed real estate agent in Oklahoma, not an attorney or financial advisor. Home Run Homes is a matchmaking service connecting buyers with owner-financed properties. Always read agreements before signing.
